steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content: $12ab$ and $6ab$ have the same variable factor, $ab$, so subtract only the coefficients: $$12ab-6ab=(12-6)ab=6ab.$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The equivalent expression is $6ab$, which matches the correct answer.

steps.title: Keep the variable factor
steps.content: Because both terms include the same factor $ab$, the result must still include $ab$. The other choices drop the variables, and forgetting that $12-6=6$.
